reference: I am experiencing an occasional warm sensation in my left thigh. It feels like warm water is spilling over my leg. It lasts for a few seconds and then is gone. The leg does not feel hot to the touch, but the sensation has occurred several times in the last twenty-four hours.
text: I am experiencing an occasional warm sensation in my left arm. It feels like warm water is flowing over my leg. It lasts for a few seconds and then is gone. The leg is not so hot to the touch, but the sensation has occurred several times in the last 24 hours.
